prompt: I need to add a dark mode toggle to the settings page in the web app

assertions.text: Agent classified this feature as 'quick' tier
Only task-list.md was generated — no FRD.md, FRS.md, GS.md, or TR.md
Output includes a scope confirmation template before generation began
task-list.md starts with a feature summary or inline requirements section
task-list.md contains between 3 and 8 implementation tasks
